shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' | head -20"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-hook-form disabled useForm setValue shouldDirty dirtyFields formState" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '200,340p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '420,490p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '740,775p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '840,955p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '130,170p' src/useForm.ts; sed -n '1,220p' src/__tests__/useForm/formState.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '470,535p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '580,735p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '900,950p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; rg -n \"updateTouchAndDirty\\(\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1010,1090p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1930,1980p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; rg -n \"disabled.*dirty|dirty.*disabled|setValue.*shouldDirty\" src/__tests__ | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/logic/createFormControl.ts && git status --short'
